title: THE PYRAMID
description: Start at 10 reps and work your way down to 1. Complete all 5 exercises each round before dropping a rep. Simple. Brutal. Earned.
warning: This challenge takes 25-35 minutes to complete. Make sure you have adequate time, space, and equipment before you begin.
shareText: Just crushed THE PYRAMID challenge on BRIK in {time}. Think you can beat it? getbrik.app
